# Support

GitHub Download Now is a free and open-source extension for Chromium and Firefox. It recommends application assets for Windows, Linux, macOS and Android. Browser support on Android is limited to Firefox for Android where add-ons are available; regular Chrome for Android does not install desktop Chrome extensions.

## Getting help

- Use GitHub Discussions for general questions and usage help.
- Open a bug report if the extension does not work as expected.
- Use the wrong-recommendation template when an unsuitable release asset is selected.
- Report security vulnerabilities according to the security policy.

When reporting a problem, include:

- the public GitHub repository URL;
- operating system and CPU architecture;
- browser and extension version;
- asset selected by the extension;
- asset you expected it to select.

## Supporting the project

You can help by starring and sharing the repository, testing different platforms and browsers, reporting unusual asset names, or contributing code, translations, documentation and tests.

All extension functionality remains free and open source.
